title: XPeng Inc Stock Forecast and Analyst Price Targets 2026
text: XPeng Inc. (XPEV) is covered by 9 analysts with an average price target of $21.74, though estimates vary. Wall Street analysts set the average 1-year price target for XPEV at 24.19 USD with a low forecast of 16.16 USD and a high forecast of 35.7 USD. Five analysts rate XPeng with a Buy consensus as of May 13, 2026. The stock rating distribution is 78.57% BUY, 14.29% HOLD and 7.14% SELL. Looking ahead to 2026, losses forecast to reduce from -CN¥2.61 to -CN¥0.931 per share. Revenue forecast remains steady at CN¥94.7b. The 29 analysts covering XPeng previously expected breakeven in 2026, but new consensus forecast suggests the company will make a profit of CN¥5.27b in 2027. For the last 6 years the compound annual growth rate for revenue is 79%. The projected CAGR for the next 3 years is 21%. Recent Street research on XPeng has leaned cautious, with several bearish analysts trimming price targets and cutting ratings, while only a few remain modestly constructive.
